calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Off Calendar

Petition For Determination That Wife Lacks Capacity To Join In Or Consent To Proposed Transaction, And For Authority To Execute And Fund Revocable Tru
Off Calendar Dec-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Hilbert Curran. Timothy Curran (Son) and Mary Curran (Daughter) also present.

Ms. Rasch presented oral argument to support her request to allow Hilbert Curran to manage the community property assets in the Trust without Court supervision and without doing annual accountings. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Determination That Wife Lacks Capacity To Join In Or Consent To Proposed Transaction, And For Authority To Execute And Fund Revocable Tru
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Continued To Dec-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
